controls.code:
7: resource "aws_db_instance" "main" {
8:   identifier              = var.rds_instance_name
9:   engine                  = "postgres"
10:   engine_version          = 17.6
11:   storage_type            = "gp2"
12:   instance_class          = "db.t3.micro"  # Adjust based on needs
13:   allocated_storage       = 20
14:   username                = var.db_username
15:   password                = var.db_password
16:   db_name                 = var.db_name
17:   vpc_security_group_ids  = [aws_security_group.rds.id]
18:   db_subnet_group_name    = aws_db_subnet_group.rds.name
19:   skip_final_snapshot     = true
20:   publicly_accessible     = false
21:   multi_az                = false  # Enable for production
22:   backup_retention_period = 7
23:   tags = { Name = "${var.rds_instance_name}-db" }
24: }
